mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, October 17, 1863
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from Head Quarters, Army of the Potomac, discussing army movements, his desire to see Gertrude, and sending his pay home.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2042
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
